products.name: XPress Plus Premium Post Fence
products.description: Friction-fit post system — slats insert directly into patented XPL posts (no side frames, no CFC). End posts are 1W, inline posts are 2W, corner posts are 90°.

product_components.name: XPL Spacer Block 5mm — 50 Pack
product_components.description: UV stabilised ASA black 5mm spacer block, 50-pack

product_components.name: XPL Spacer Block 9mm — 50 Pack
product_components.description: UV stabilised ASA black 9mm spacer block, 50-pack

product_components.name: XPL Spacer Block 20mm — 50 Pack
product_components.description: UV stabilised ASA black 20mm spacer block, 50-pack (actual spacer 21mm)

product_components.name: XPL Slat Locking Clip — 10 Pack
product_components.description: Powder coated aluminium slat locking clip, 10-pack incl. SS304 screws. Fixes top slat only.

product_components.name: XPL Block — 5 Pack
product_components.description: 100mm long UV stabilised ASA block, 5-pack. Starting height spacer — can be cut to size.

product_components.name: XPL Side Frame 6000mm — Black Satin
product_components.description: XPL friction-fit side frame, 6000mm stock (used in BAYG side frame variant)

rule_sets.name: XPL Fence Rules
rule_sets.description: Data-driven XPL premium post fence BOM rules v4.1

rule_versions.notes: Initial XPL rules based on CTS V4.1 formulas

product_constraints.name: max_panel_width_mm
product_constraints.message: Panel width above 2600mm not supported; split into additional panels.

product_validations.name: panel_width_in_range
product_validations.message: Panel width must be between 300mm and 2600mm.

product_rules.name: insertion_depth_mm
product_rules.notes: Slat insertion depth into 1W/2W posts is 24mm. For 90° corner post it is 15mm — handled per span.

product_rules.name: slat_cut_mm
product_rules.notes: Standard span: slat cut = post centre-to-centre - 2x24mm insertion depth

product_rules.name: slat_cut_mm_deduction
product_rules.notes: Fence panel slat cut deduction (standard fence panel, -15mm)

product_rules.name: num_slats
product_rules.notes: Same slat count formula as QSHS

product_rules.name: spacer_packs
product_rules.notes: XPL uses pre-packed 50-pack spacers. Spacers go between slats = num_slats - 1 gaps.

product_rules.name: slatclip_packs
product_rules.notes: 1 pack XPL-SLATCLIP-10PK per panel — locks the top slat only

product_rules.name: num_posts
product_rules.notes: XPL: posts are user-placed (end/inline/corner), not boundary-derived

product_rules.name: std_post_count
product_rules.notes: Standard FP/HD post count when not using XPL post system

product_rules.name: emit_xpl_end_post
product_rules.notes: XPL 1-way end post; priced TBD — see XPL catalogue

product_rules.name: emit_xpl_inline_post
product_rules.notes: XPL 2-way inline post; priced TBD

product_rules.name: emit_xpl_corner_post
product_rules.notes: XPL 90° corner post; priced TBD

product_rules.name: emit_post_50_2400
product_rules.notes: 50mm FP 2400mm when using standard posts with XPL fence

product_rules.name: emit_post_50_6000
product_rules.notes: 50mm FP 6000mm when using standard posts with XPL fence

product_rules.name: emit_post_65_2400
product_rules.notes: 65mm HD 2400mm when using standard posts with XPL fence

product_rules.name: emit_post_65_6000
product_rules.notes: 65mm HD 6000mm when using standard posts with XPL fence

product_rules.name: emit_top_plate_50
product_rules.notes: Top plate for 6000mm FP post

product_rules.name: emit_base_plate_50
product_rules.notes: Base plate set for surface-mount FP post

product_rules.name: emit_domical_cover_50
product_rules.notes: Domical cover for FP base plate

product_rules.name: emit_dress_ring_50
product_rules.notes: Dress ring for FP core-drill install

product_rules.name: emit_top_plate_65
product_rules.notes: Top plate for 6000mm HD post

product_rules.name: emit_base_plate_65
product_rules.notes: Base plate set for surface-mount HD post

product_rules.name: emit_domical_cover_65
product_rules.notes: Domical cover for HD base plate

product_rules.name: emit_dress_ring_65

product_warnings.message: XPL system does not use side frames or CFC covers — slats insert directly into friction-fit posts.
Top slat must be locked with XPL-SLATCLIP-10PK (1 pack per panel).
65mm HD posts are not available in Primrose (P) or Paperbark (PB). Please select a different colour for HD posts, or switch to 50mm FP posts.
In-ground mounting: no post accessories required. Ensure min 450mm embedment depth (increase for soft soil).
Heights above 2100mm require 6000mm posts. A top plate cap has been automatically included.
XPL patented post pricing is not yet in the price list. Confirm pricing with supplier before quoting.
Mounting method (in-ground / base plate / core drill) only applies when using standard 50mm or 65mm posts, not XPL patented posts.

product_companion_rules.notes: 6000mm FP post always needs top plate cap; 1 per post
6000mm HD post always needs top plate cap; 1 per post
Domical cover is already emitted by rule; companion enforces pairing if base plate is manually added
